name: Canva
description: Online graphic design platform for creators. Make social media graphics, presentations, videos, posters and more. Has a Pro subscription with affiliate program.

name: Descript
description: All-in-one video and podcast editing software. Edit audio and video by editing text. Overdub AI voice cloning, screen recording, and publishing built in.

name: Riverside.fm
description: Professional podcast and video recording studio in the browser. Records separate high-quality tracks per person. Used by major podcasters and YouTubers.

name: ConvertKit
description: Email marketing platform built specifically for creators — bloggers, YouTubers, podcasters. Landing pages, automations, paid newsletters. Strong affiliate program.

name: Beehiiv
description: Newsletter platform built for growth. Used by major newsletter creators. Monetization built in — ads, paid subscriptions, boosts. Growing fast.

name: Kajabi
description: All-in-one platform for selling online courses, memberships, coaching and digital products. Used by top course creators. High ticket affiliate commissions.

name: Teachable
description: Online course and coaching platform for creators. Sell courses, coaching sessions and digital downloads. Competing with Kajabi at lower price point.

name: Notion
description: All-in-one workspace for notes, docs, databases and project management. Hugely popular with creators for content planning, second brain and wikis.

name: Loom
description: Video messaging tool for async communication. Record screen and camera simultaneously. Used by creators for tutorials, walkthroughs and client communication.

name: Jasper AI
description: AI writing assistant for marketing content. Blog posts, social media, ads, emails. One of the original AI writing tools with a strong affiliate program.

name: Opus Clip
description: AI video repurposing tool. Takes long YouTube or podcast videos and automatically clips them into viral short-form content for TikTok, Reels and Shorts.

name: Pictory
description: AI video creation tool. Turns blog posts and scripts into videos automatically. Adds stock footage, captions and voiceover. Popular with content marketers.

name: Synthesia
description: AI video generation platform. Create professional videos with AI avatars reading your script. No camera or studio needed. Used by businesses and creators.

name: ElevenLabs
description: AI voice generation and cloning platform. Create realistic voiceovers in any language. Used by podcasters, video creators and audiobook producers.

name: Otter.ai
description: AI meeting transcription and note-taking. Records, transcribes and summarises meetings and interviews automatically. Popular with podcasters and journalists.

name: Substack
description: Newsletter and subscription platform. Writers publish and monetise newsletters directly to subscribers. Huge creator economy platform.

name: Buzzsprout
description: Podcast hosting platform. Upload, distribute and promote podcasts to all major platforms. Analytics, monetisation and affiliate marketplace built in.

name: Podcastle
description: AI-powered podcast creation studio. Record, edit, transcribe and publish podcasts. AI tools for noise removal, voice enhancement and content repurposing.

name: Later
description: Social media scheduling and analytics platform. Plan and schedule Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Pinterest and Twitter content. Visual calendar interface.

name: Metricool
description: Social media analytics and scheduling tool. Manage all social accounts in one place. Competitor analysis, best posting times, detailed analytics.

name: Surfer SEO
description: AI SEO content optimisation tool. Analyses top ranking pages and tells you exactly what to write to rank. Content editor with real-time SEO scoring.

name: Writesonic
description: AI writing platform for blogs, ads, social media and SEO content. Includes Chatsonic AI assistant. Competing with Jasper at lower price point.

name: Typeform
description: Interactive form and survey builder. Used by creators for audience research, lead generation and waitlists. Beautiful conversational interface.

name: Stan Store
description: Link-in-bio store for creators. Sell digital products, courses, bookings and memberships directly from social media profiles. Growing fast with Gen Z creators.

name: Gumroad
description: Platform for selling digital products directly to audiences. Ebooks, courses, templates, software, music. Simple setup with no monthly fees.
